steps.title: Identify the contrast signal
steps.content: The word though signals a contrast: “there have been many studies” of high altitude effects versus “[blank]” studies of below sea level effects.

steps.title: Apply the contrast to find the right word
steps.content: ”Paucity of” means scarcity or lack, which expresses the opposite of “many” and creates the necessary contrast. The other choices either reference dispute (“quarrel about”), abundance (“profusion of”), or appearance of truth (“verisimilitude in”), none of which create opposition to “many.” That matches choice B — B is correct.
